source: characterization from Android BleRscClientTest and iOS BleRscClientTest RSC measurement payload
description: RSC measurement with stride length, total distance, and running flags set. Shared KMP owns only deterministic byte parsing; Android and iOS adapters keep public projection units.
notes: RSC measurement parsing is a pure byte-level codec. GATT client lifecycle, notifications, transport execution, cache and stream behavior, and public error mapping stay platform-owned.
